nasb.text: The sons of Israel lived among the Canaanites, the Hittites, the Amorites, the Perizzites, the Hivites, and the Jebusites;

esv.text: So the people of Israel lived among the Canaanites, the Hittites, the Amorites, the Perizzites, the Hivites, and the Jebusites.

cnv.text: 以色列人就住在迦南人、赫人、亞摩利人、比利洗人、希未人、耶布斯人中間；

ccb.text: 以色列人住在这些迦南人、赫人、亚摩利人、比利洗人、希未人和耶布斯人当中，
